name: Brownie Peanut Butter Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare a 18-cup muffin pan with paper baking cups and spray with cooking spray.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the brownie mix, water, oil, and eggs. Mix well until fully combined.
4. Fill each lined cup about two-thirds full with the batter.
5. Press one peanut butter cup into the batter in each cup, ensuring the top edge of the candy is even with the top of the batter.
6. Bake for 33 minutes or until the brownies are set.
